papers.name: Paper 1 Short Answer and Data Response

assessment_objectives.name: Demonstrate knowledge and understanding
assessment_objectives.description: Demonstrate knowledge and understanding of business concepts and terminology.
classification_hints: Items asking for definitions, terminology, recall of business concepts.

assessment_objectives.name: Apply knowledge and understanding
assessment_objectives.description: Apply knowledge and understanding to a range of contexts including familiar and unfamiliar business situations.
classification_hints: Items requiring application of business concepts to scenarios, calculations, interpretation.

assessment_objectives.name: Analyse, evaluate and make judgements
assessment_objectives.description: Analyse, evaluate and make judgements about business information, issues and arguments.
classification_hints: Items requiring evaluation, judgement, weighing up arguments, drawing conclusions.

question_styles.name: Data response
question_styles.description: Interpretation of business data, charts and tables.

difficulty_ladder.description: Recall of facts, definitions or single-step application.

lesson_use.notes: Set supported=true only when a teacher/student/parent mode is declared and validated.

marking_guidance.command_words_ref: CAIE IGCSE Business Studies command words (state, explain, analyse, evaluate, discuss) are defined in Section 4 of the syllabus.
marking_guidance.notes: Single-tier qualification (grades A*-G). Both papers required.
